description: Recall test — model must remember facts mentioned earlier in conversation, even after gap-filler messages.
gap_fillers: Tell me a fun fact about space.
What year did the internet become publicly available?

questions.question: Earlier I told you a codeword. What was it?
questions.setup: Remember this codeword for later: THUNDERBIRD. Don't repeat it now, just acknowledge you've stored it.

questions.question: What's my dog's name?
questions.setup: By the way, my dog's name is Rex. He's a golden retriever.

questions.question: What's my favorite game?
questions.setup: I've been playing Kingdom Come Deliverance II non-stop lately. Best game I've played in years.

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether model retains user-provided facts across conversation turns and gap fillers
